iterate_latest.summary: FR-01.36: one-click Launch (Cx) button launches a single campaign sub-iterate via /shipwright-iterate "<specPath>" built server-side from {slug,stepId}; replaces the per-step Copy-launch clipboard button. Direct launch for ordinary steps; confirm dialog only for failed/escalated/plan-first steps. New server launch branch applyCampaignStepBranch.

unit.evidence: full server (121/1515) + client (147/1542) vitest green; tsc --noEmit clean both; oxlint clean on changed files

integration.reason: covered by the server branch HTTP tests + the real E2E

e2e.reason: see surface_verification — real isolated-stack browser run

surface_verification.evidence: 1/1 passed (4.5s) in Chromium against an isolated single-process worktree stack (built client via SHIPWRIGHT_STATIC_DIR, temp USERPROFILE, SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local, PORT=3863) seeded with an ACTIVE campaign whose B1 sub-iterate has a spec file. Flow: board → expand → 'Launch (B1)' enabled → one-click direct launch (no dialog) → REAL server campaign-step branch creates a task → navigated to /tasks/<id>. API pre-check confirmed nextPending.specPath non-null before the run.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 server builds /shipwright-iterate "<specPath>" for the step (one quoted positional, no --resume)
behaviors.evidence: campaign-step-branch.test.ts AC1 (real Hono HTTP, posix/pwsh/cmd) + real E2E launch

behaviors.behavior: AC2 step with null specPath → 400 campaign_step_spec_missing
AC3 campaignStep mixed with actionId/phaseTaskRef/campaignSlug → 400 mixed_launch_intents
AC3 genuine resume (JSONL on disk) falls through to --resume (no fresh command)
behaviors.evidence: shared routes-level effectivelyFreshStart gate (if !effectivelyFreshStart return null), identical to campaign-branch.ts; verified by review

behaviors.behavior: AC4 Launch button disabled when no next / null specPath / no project
AC4 button labelled 'Launch (Cx)' for the next-pending id
AC5 ordinary next step → one-click direct launch (no dialog) + navigate
AC5 inline error surfaced on launch failure
AC6 risky (failed/escalated/plan-first) next step → confirm dialog gates launch
AC6 confirming the dialog launches + navigates
Fail-safe (review M1): next-pending id missing from steps → dialog, never direct-launch
behaviors.evidence: CampaignStepLaunchButton.test.tsx 'fail-safe — a next-pending id missing from steps'

behaviors.behavior: client API seam: launchCampaignStepRun POSTs exactly {campaignStep:{slug,stepId}}
useLaunchCampaign refactor preserves the autonomous behavior (title/launch-args/handoff)
behaviors.evidence: existing useLaunchCampaign.test.ts unchanged + green after the launchCampaignTask extraction

behaviors.behavior: old per-step Copy-launch button removed from the card
behaviors.evidence: CampaignLaneCard.test.tsx asserts the old campaign-launch testid is null + Launch present

enumeration_basis.plus: M1 fail-safe + API seam + refactor-preservation + copy-removal regressions
